---
title: "Sarah Arnold"
---

## Sarah Arnold

**Dates:** (Otterbourne 1821/2-1896)

**Maiden name:** (Vine)

### Description

wife of James John Arnold

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 14 1900
- Letter from Novr 22 [1896][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Novr 4th [1869?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
